# page-tree

## Plugin reference

- Description: Sidebar page-tree plus the page-detail pane (header, editor, sections slot) for the Pages app.
- Web:
  - Slots: `PageDetail.Section` ← `apps.pages.page-tree`, `apps.story.pages-integration`, `PageDetail.HeaderActions` ← `apps.pages.starred`, `PageTree.RowActions` ← `apps.pages.page-tree`, `apps.pages.starred`, `apps.story.pages-integration`, `pageDetailPane.Actions`
  - Contributes: `Pane.Register` "page-detail", `Pages.Sidebar` "Pages" → `PagesSidebar`, `PageDetail.Section` → `BacklinksSection`, `PageTree.RowActions` "delete" → `DeletePageAction`
  - Uses: `apps/pages/shell.Pages`, `infra/attachments.uploadAttachment`, `infra/endpoints.fetchEndpoint`, `infra/endpoints.useEndpointMutation`, `page/editor.BLOCK_GUTTER`, `page/editor.BlockEditor`, `page/editor.PageIcon`, `page/links.Backlinks`, `primitives/app-shell.SidebarPaneSection`, `primitives/breadcrumb.Breadcrumb`, `primitives/breadcrumb.BreadcrumbSegment`, `primitives/data-view.DataView`, `primitives/data-view.defineItemActions`, `primitives/editable-field.useEditableField`, `primitives/icon-picker.IconPicker`, `primitives/live-state.ResourceView`, `primitives/live-state.useResource`, `primitives/loading.Loading`, `primitives/pane.Pane`, `primitives/pane.PaneChrome`, `primitives/pane.useOpenPane`, `primitives/placeholder.Placeholder`, `primitives/row.Row`, `primitives/section-label.SectionLabel`, `primitives/slot-render.defineRenderSlot`, `primitives/spacing.Stack`, `primitives/text-editor/paste-images.attachmentUrl`, `primitives/text.Text`, `primitives/ui-kit.Button`, `primitives/ui-kit.cn`, `primitives/ui-kit.Dialog`, `primitives/ui-kit.DialogContent`, `primitives/ui-kit.DialogDescription`, `primitives/ui-kit.DialogTitle`, `primitives/ui-kit.Popover`, `primitives/ui-kit.PopoverContent`, `primitives/ui-kit.PopoverTrigger`
  - Exports: Types: `PageSeedBlock`; Values: `createPageWithSeed`, `PageDetail`, `pageDetailPane`, `PageTree`
